goals: 1. Complete correct engine — fix all GAPs, all choices policy-driven
2. Full policy control — every rng decision routes through PolicyCallback
3. Train model that plays reasonable 8-10 turn games with itself (no blunders)
4. Push combined WR vs heuristic to >0.50 (current best: v6_iter20=0.458, new project record)
current_task: v8 PPO COMPLETE and FAILED. US overfit v1 COMPLETE and FAILED. Both 500g benches collected. Pool-rebalancing thesis is falsified. Pivot triggered per pre-committed abort criterion. Next: re-bench v6_iter20 on fresh seed to confirm record, then v9_dense with dense reward on full-pool config.
current_strategy: v8 FAILED hard: iter80 combined=0.351 (USSR=0.462, US=0.240), 10.7pp BELOW v6_iter20 record and 7.2pp below v7_iter80. US overfit v1 iter40 FAILED even harder: US=0.080 (500g bench), -28pp from us_only_v5 warmstart. Both experiments shared heuristic-floor=0.30 + trimmed fixtures. Two independent falsifications of the pool-rebalancing hypothesis. Pre-committed abort_criterion triggered (iter 20 combined<0.40 → pivot). v6_iter20=0.458 remains project record, now 3 consecutive runs failed to match it. v9 plan: (A) re-bench v6_iter20 with seed 60000/60500 to verify record is reproducible (2 min GPU); (B) if record holds, launch v9_dense = v6_iter20 warmstart + dense_reward_alpha=0.3 + REVERT to heuristic-floor=0.15 + restore full 8-fixture league pool. Dense reward is the new intervention; everything else back to v6/v7 config. See opus_analysis_20260420_v8_results_v9_plan.md. Rollout_wr vs bench divergence is now a known systemic issue (us_overfit had rollout US=0.495 but bench US=0.080; v8 rollout US≈0.29 bench US=0.24).

iter20.note: TRUE BEST — new project record (+1.7pp over v56)

iter80.note: WORST — ppo_best.pt incorrectly points here due to panel-masking bug

v6_final_results.root_cause: league_fixture_fadeout=50 caused 100% self-play echo chamber from iter 51+. All fixtures (scripted + __heuristic__) dropped from pool. US side (weaker) collapsed fastest.
v6_final_results.running_best_bug: panel-aggregate WR saturates near 0.5 once past-self dominates the panel, hiding heuristic-side regression. Manual checkpoint selection required.

v7_final_results.status: COMPLETE — 80 iters. Fadeout fix worked (no panel collapse). Heuristic-combined REGRESSED vs v6_iter20.

iter40.note: highest league Elo but still below v6_iter20 on heuristic

iter80.note: USSR all-time high; US all-time low; combined < v6_iter20

panel_avg_trajectory.note: monotone up but misleading — panel is 7:1 league-weighted vs heuristic

iter40.note: WINNER — +99 vs v56, strongest vs BC cluster ever

v7_final_results.diagnosis: US side over-specialized to self-similar BC-cluster+past-self pool. USSR generalized well (+16pp vs heuristic) but US lost generalization (-20pp vs heuristic). Same disease as v6, different symptom — fadeout fix prevented running-best bug, but league-style dominant pool produced directional US regression.

next_tasks: PIVOT to Dirichlet noise (CLAUDE.md Phase 0a, priority #1)
Wire apply_root_dirichlet_noise() in mcts.cpp (already implemented lines 521-549)
Teacher distillation: 100 US hard positions from v6_iter20 games (Option C)
Architecture: GNN adjacency + regional scoring (Phase 2a/2b from CLAUDE.md plan)
Do NOT run more v14+ PPO experiments without a fundamentally new intervention

v6_iter40_country_attn.note: Post-fadeout regression (−13.4pp vs v56). Confirms root cause.

No model has decisively separated from the BC cluster yet — Elo progress needs something beyond v7 (teacher search, multi-head, or dense reward).

eval-panel matched to 4 entries (faster eval + less self-similar masking)

US overfit v1 also FAILED (US=0.080 at iter40, -28pp from warmstart). Two independent falsifications of pool-rebalancing thesis; pre-committed abort_criterion triggered. Panel iter80 heuristic cell (0.583) was 30-game noise (true bench=0.240). rollout_wr vs bench divergence is systemic (us_overfit had 0.415 gap). v6_iter20=0.458 remains project record after 3 consecutive failed attempts to match it. v9 plan: (A) re-bench v6_iter20 seed 60000/60500 to verify record (2 min GPU); (B) v9_dense = v6_iter20 warmstart + --dense-reward-alpha 0.3 + REVERT heuristic-floor to 0.15 + restore full 8-fixture pool. Dense reward is the new intervention; everything else back to v6/v7 config. See opus_analysis_20260420_v8_results_v9_plan.md for full analysis.
current_experiment: v13 finishing (iter68/80). True peak=iter20 (0.427). Analysis complete.

experiment_history.name: v9_dense_reward
experiment_history.root_cause: Dense reward shifted value targets; value head lagged; KL abort iter63. v6_iter20 is PPO-toxic as warmstart (4 consecutive failures).

experiment_history.name: v10_opus_recipe
experiment_history.root_cause: --pfsp-exponent 0.5 + --league-mix-k 6 from Opus command deviated from v6 recipe. pfsp-exp=0.5 increases sampling weight on near-loss matchups, creating US collapse feedback loop.
experiment_history.lesson: Opus added non-v6 flags. Always strip to pure v6 defaults when replaying v6 recipe.

experiment_history.name: v11_val_calib_regression
experiment_history.root_cause: --val-calib-coef 0.1 (v6 default=0.0) biases value head toward mean return, destroying reward signal. Also Opus template had --self-play-heuristic-mix 0.2 explicitly.
experiment_history.lesson: val-calib-coef must be 0.0 to match v6. Never add non-zero extra loss terms when replaying a recipe.

experiment_history.name: v12_wrong_seed_kl_explosion
experiment_history.result: KL abort iter65 (KL=27.68). iter20 bench=0.350, running_best=0.291
experiment_history.root_cause: Seed=47000 vs v6 seed=42000 explains 10.9pp gap at iter20. Also KL instability late.
experiment_history.lesson: v6 seed=42000 is critical. Seed variance is the primary driver of PPO outcome.

key_finding: v6 seed was 42000. Seed sensitivity range: ~10pp at iter20 (0.350 seed47000 vs 0.459 seed42000). Training code verified unchanged from v6.
investigation_conclusion: Seed=42000 reproduces v6 trajectory (v13 iter20=0.427 vs v6 iter20=0.459). Gap explained by async panel giving v6 ~2.5 extra gradient iters. Training always peaks at iter20 and declines (PFSP echo chamber). fadeout=999 does not help. Current code practical peak: ~0.427 combined.
